MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-19-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoenas For Reports Prepared By Alan Zacharia, Md From Jan-01-04 To Present As A Result Of The Physiucal Examination Conducted Per Ccp 2032.210, Et Seq. And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-20-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted.
1. Defendant Ngoc-Tho Thi Vu's motion to quash deposition subpoenas for reports prepared by Alan Zacharia, MD from January 1, 2004 to present, granted; the deponent shall not be required to disclose any reports, other than reports or related documents prepared in connection with any examination or treatment of plaintiff;
2. The protective order shall be subject to future modification, on noticed motion and based on a showing of new facts or changed circumstances;
3. Request for sanctions denied. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
